name: insertUserInfo handles role fetch error gracefully
description: When GetRoles fails, insertUserInfo should still set the user in context without crashing

steps.name: role fetch error does not crash
ASSERT: User should still be set in context even when roles fetch fails

parameters.name: Actual
parameters.value: *user.User(&user.User{AcceptedTermsAt:time.Date(1, time.January, 1, 0, 0, 0, 0, time.UTC), AvatarUrl:(*string)(nil), Bio:(*string)(nil), Country:core.Map(nil), CreatedAt:time.Date(1, time.January, 1, 0, 0, 0, 0, time.UTC), DeletedAt:(*core.NullTime)(nil), Email:"", FirstLoginTime:time.Date(1, time.January, 1, 0, 0, 0, 0, time.UTC), FirstName:"", ID:[16]uint8{0x80, 0xf1, 0xb3, 0xb8, 0xb, 0x0, 0x47, 0xe2, 0x80, 0x29, 0xdf, 0xfe, 0xab, 0xa4, 0x86, 0x1c}, LastLoginTime:time.Date(1, time.January, 1, 0, 0, 0, 0, time.UTC), LastName:"", Organizations:(*struct { OrganizationsWithRoles *[]map[string]interface {} "db:\"organizations_with_roles\" json:\"organizationsWithRoles\" yaml:\"organizationsWithRoles\""; TotalCount *int "db:\"total_count\" json:\"totalCount\" yaml:\"totalCount\"" })(nil), Preferences:(*user.Preference)(nil), Provider:"", Region:core.Map(nil), RoleNames:(*[]user.UserRoleNames)(nil), Socials:(*user.UserSocials)(nil), Status:"", Teams:(*struct { TeamsWithRoles *[]map[string]interface {} "db:\"teams_with_roles\" json:\"teamsWithRoles\" yaml:\"teamsWithRoles\""; TotalCount *int "db:\"total_count\" json:\"totalCount\" yaml:\"totalCount\"" })(nil), UpdatedAt:time.Date(1, time.January, 1, 0, 0, 0, 0, time.UTC), UserId:""})
